---
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-style: plain
---

:::: columns

::: {.column width="40%"}
![GLobal Energy Sustainability](docs/posts/energy/image.jpg)
:::

::: {.column width="5%"}
:::

::: {.column width="55%"}
###### testing spaces for new columns
:::

::::
